message:
feat(extensions): add SEC-7.1 shadow mode for runtime risk scoring (bd-2teqs)

Add `enforce: bool` flag to RuntimeRiskConfig (default: true). When
enforce=false (shadow mode), hostcalls are scored and telemetry is
recorded but enforcement actions are downgraded to Allow — calls
always proceed while capturing counterfactual actions for review.

Changes:
- RuntimeRiskConfig gains `enforce` field with shadow mode semantics
- dispatch_host_call_shared bypasses risk-based denial in shadow mode
- will_dispatch always true in shadow mode (risk scoring still runs)
- QuotaBreachEvent gains PartialEq derive (needed by IncidentEvidenceBundle)
- 3 new integration tests: shadow mode dispatch, enforced vs shadow
  telemetry comparison, runtime toggle between modes
- All existing test construction sites updated with enforce: true

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
